mandate: Add vendor contact prompts in onboarding flow, reframe copy as setting up your wedding village
keyFindings: Onboarding flow now prompts couples to add vendor contacts alongside guest contacts
Copy reframed from 'set up your guest FAQ' to 'set up your wedding village'
Vendor contact collection is optional — couples can skip and add later
whatWorked: Light-touch copy changes. No new onboarding steps added, just expanded existing ones.
whatFailed: Nothing failed. Testament was not written at sunset (retroactive).
recommendationsForNextAgent: The onboarding steps are defined in the onboarding page components. Step count should stay at 7 or fewer to avoid drop-off.
spiritContribution: Ensured new couples encounter the vendor coordination message from their first interaction.
